CHART
Here Saturn and Mercury are
in forest. The native may be employed
Dh. Jupt
in a broadcasting department or an
organisation dealing with conve
Moon
yances. He will live happily and have
Sun
good promotions. He will come into
Ven.
possession of a house and also live
Mars
happily all along his life.
Sat.
Dt
Mer.
CHART 63
This native will be intelligent; but with medium education. He will be
popular and devotional. His mother will live long. He will have 2 brothers
who will be rich and happy. He will be married at 30-31. His faith will bring
him success. Saturn is in a forest with no planets in the 12th or 7th from him.
Jupiter in Taurus only should help him. What he will earn will suffice for
food. His mother will not be of great help to him. Venus and the Sun are
situated in the 7th to Moon. Father's property will be small and even that he

50 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
will not be able to get. Two brothers
Ven.
will become famous. All efforts and no Dh. Jupt
gains is his fate.
